# guardicore_label_group (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a label group from Akamai Guardicore Segmentation. You can look up a label group by its ID or by its key and value combination.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a label group by ID.
data "guardicore_label_group" "by_id" {
  id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010"
}

# Look up a label group by key and value.
data "guardicore_label_group" "production_web" {
  key   = "Server Group"
  value = "Production Web"
}

output "label_group_typed_selectors" {
  value = {
    include = data.guardicore_label_group.production_web.include
    exclude = data.guardicore_label_group.production_web.exclude
  }
}

output "label_group_json_selectors" {
  value = {
    include_json = data.guardicore_label_group.production_web.include_json
    exclude_json = data.guardicore_label_group.production_web.exclude_json
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the label group. Either id or both key and value must be specified.
- `key` (String) The key (category) of the label group. Used together with value to look up a label group.
- `value` (String) The value of the label group. Used together with key to look up a label group.

### Read-Only

- `comments` (String) Comments or description for the label group.
- `exclude` (Attributes) Typed selector defining labels to exclude using `or_groups[*].label_ids`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--exclude))
- `exclude_json` (String) The normalized exclude selector JSON returned by the API.
- `include` (Attributes) Typed selector defining labels to include using `or_groups[*].label_ids`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--include))
- `include_json` (String) The normalized include selector JSON returned by the API.

<a id="nestedatt--exclude"></a>
### Nested Schema for `exclude`

Read-Only:

- `or_groups` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--exclude--or_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--exclude--or_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `exclude.or_groups`

Read-Only:

- `label_ids` (List of String)



<a id="nestedatt--include"></a>
### Nested Schema for `include`

Read-Only:

- `or_groups` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--include--or_groups))

<a id="nestedatt--include--or_groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `include.or_groups`

Read-Only:

- `label_ids` (List of String)
